news.t: How To Avoid The Worst Sector ETFs 3Q23

holdings.infoBox: PSCC is an equity ETF with a total of 27 individual holdings. The top holdings are Lamb Weston Holdings stock at 12.32%, PriceSmart at 8.92%, The Vita Coco Company at 8.52%, Cal-Maine Foods at 6.97%, and The Chefs' Warehouse at 5.53%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P SmallCap Consumer Staples ETF (PSCC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer staples equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of consumer staples stocks selected from the S&P SmallCap 600. PSCC was launched on Apr 7, 2010 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: S&P Small Cap 600 Capped Consumer Staples

data.title: How To Avoid The Worst Sector ETFs 3Q23
data.text: I leverage my firm's data to identify three red flags you can use to avoid the worst ETFs.
